creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
roam        2009-10-15 11:04:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/paperkey    Makefile distinfo 
  Removed files:
    security/paperkey    pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Update paperkey to version 1.2, getting rid of the packing list by
  using the PLIST_FILES and PORTDOCS variables in a slightly different
  way than in the PR.
  
  PR:             139642
  Submitted by:   Sylvio Cesar <scjamorim@bsd.com.br>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4       +4 -2      ports/security/paperkey/Makefile
  1.4       +3 -3      ports/security/paperkey/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -4      ports/security/paperkey/pkg-plist (dead)
